event.description:
In which James builds upon the previous day's SBT-Web-fu and live codes a Play 2.3 app!

Reactive All The Way Down

The world is going Reactive but not just for the back-end; UIs are also becoming Reactive. In this session we will walk through how to build an end-to-end Reactive application with Scala, Play Framework, Akka, and AngularJS.

Fun fact: this is Alexy's birthday. Thanks James for coming all the way from Colorado to help us celebrate with Scala folks in SF at SF Scala!:)

Agenda

6:00 doors open

6:30 announcements, including 1-minute hiring pitches -- prepare yours!

6:40 talks begin

RSVP strictly enforced, pls manage yours responsibly...
event.title: Reactive All the Way Down with James Ward, 2/2
